'''jodangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabbable|stabbable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabbable|stabbable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jodangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodangithi|jodangithi]] || [[word:jodangiji|jodangiji]] || [[word:jodangishi|jodangishi]] || [[word:jodangiki|jodangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodanguthuthu|jodanguthuthu]] || [[word:jodangujuju|jodangujuju]] || [[word:jodangushushu|jodangushushu]] || [[word:jodangukuku|jodangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodanguthu|jodanguthu]] || [[word:jodanguju|jodanguju]] || [[word:jodangushu|jodangushu]] || [[word:jodanguku|jodanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodangufthuf|jodangufthuf]] || [[word:jodangufjuf|jodangufjuf]] || [[word:jodangufshuf|jodangufshuf]] || [[word:jodangufkuf|jodangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodangethe|jodangethe]] || [[word:jodangeje|jodangeje]] || [[word:jodangeshe|jodangeshe]] || [[word:jodangeke|jodangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodangothotho|jodangothotho]] || [[word:jodangojojo|jodangojojo]] || [[word:jodangoshosho|jodangoshosho]] || [[word:jodangokoko|jodangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodangotho|jodangotho]] || [[word:jodangojo|jodangojo]] || [[word:jodangosho|jodangosho]] || [[word:jodangoko|jodangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodangofthof|jodangofthof]] || [[word:jodangofjof|jodangofjof]] || [[word:jodangofshof|jodangofshof]] || [[word:jodangofkof|jodangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfthĂŻf|jodangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfjĂŻf|jodangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfshĂŻf|jodangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfkĂŻf|jodangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jodangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jodangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jodangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jodangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfthĂŻf|jodangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfjĂŻf|jodangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfshĂŻf|jodangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfkĂŻf|jodangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfthĂŻf|jodangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfjĂŻf|jodangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfshĂŻf|jodangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jodangĂŻfkĂŻf|jodangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodangĂŠthĂŠ|jodangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jodangĂŠjĂŠ|jodangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jodangĂŠshĂŠ|jodangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jodangĂŠkĂŠ|jodangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodangathatha|jodangathatha]] || [[word:jodangajaja|jodangajaja]] || [[word:jodangashasha|jodangashasha]] || [[word:jodangakaka|jodangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodangatha|jodangatha]] || [[word:jodangaja|jodangaja]] || [[word:jodangasha|jodangasha]] || [[word:jodangaka|jodangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodangafthaf|jodangafthaf]] || [[word:jodangafjaf|jodangafjaf]] || [[word:jodangafshaf|jodangafshaf]] || [[word:jodangafkaf|jodangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jodangasha|jodangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodangshĂ«sha|jodangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodangrosha|jodangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodangmusha|jodangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodangyasha|jodangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodangnkshĂ«sha|gojodangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodangnkrosha|gojodangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodangnkmusha|gojodangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodangnkyasha|gojodangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jodadangasha|jodadangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodadangshĂ«sha|jodadangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodadangrosha|jodadangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodadangmusha|jodadangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodadangyasha|jodadangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodadangnkshĂ«sha|gojodadangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodadangnkrosha|gojodadangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodadangnkmusha|gojodadangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodadangnkyasha|gojodadangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jedĂŠngasha|jedĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jedĂŠngshĂ«sha|jedĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jedĂŠngrosha|jedĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jedĂŠngmusha|jedĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jedĂŠngyasha|jedĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojedĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gojedĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojedĂŠngnkrosha|gojedĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojedĂŠngnkmusha|gojedĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojedĂŠngnkyasha|gojedĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jodfangasha|jodfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodfangshĂ«sha|jodfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodfangrosha|jodfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodfangmusha|jodfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodfangyasha|jodfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodfangnkshĂ«sha|gojodfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodfangnkrosha|gojodfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodfangnkmusha|gojodfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodfangnkyasha|gojodfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
